title: Conquest Awakening
description: Conquest Reforged mod compatibility resource pack for Gravestones, Numismatic Overhaul, Bountiful, and more.
body:
[![Project Logo](https://i.imgur.com/iBiOO1X.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rTrmBCww) Resource pack support for a multitude of mods, matching them to the style of the [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) mod.

Current mods:
[MmmMmmMmmMmm](https://modrinth.com/mod/mmmmmmmmmmmm)
[Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumono_gravestones)
[Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful)
[Numismatic Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatic-overhaul)
[Gearifiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/gearifiers)
[Armor Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-statues)
[Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll)
[Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes)
[Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout)


### Huge thanks and credit to Monsterfish for allowing me to use some textures from [Conquest_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/conquest_)
